def yaml_to_json(yaml_file_path: str) -> str:
    '''Umurizo w'inyuma w'umurimo w'urubuga rusange ushindura dosiye ya YAML kugira ngo ibe imvugo ya json. Umurizo usoma ibiri muri dosiye ya YAML uva mu nzira yoherejwe, ukayihindura mu buryo bwa JSON, hanyuma ukagarura imvugo ya JSON. Niba hari ikosa, nk'uko dosiye itabonetse, ibiri muri YAML bitemewe cyangwa ibiri muri yo bitashobora guhindurwa kugira ngo bibe JSON, garura ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirira 'Error: '.\n\n    Args:\n        yaml_file_path: Inzira yoherejwe dosiye ya YAML guhindurwa.\n\n    Returns:\n        str: Imvugo ya JSON yahinduwe uva mu dosiye ya YAML, cyangwa ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirira 'Error: '.'''

from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Ushyireho umutekano amakuru ukoresheje urufunguzo ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC.
Urufunguzo rwatanze rufite uburebure buhagije (>= 64 bytes) ku buryo bwose bushoboka. Hitamo uburyo bumwe gusa bwo gushyira mu bikorwa no gukoresha igice cy'urufunguzo rwatanze gihura n'uburebure busabwa. Ntukihitire mu buryo hashingiwe ku burebure bw'urufunguzo.
Subiza amakuru y'ibanga, IV (ikigereranyo cy'ibanze), n'urufunguzo rwakoreshejwe mu kubika amakuru.

Args:
	key (bytes): Amaboko yo gukora urufunguzo rwo kubika amakuru.
	data (bytes): Amakuru yo kubika.

Returns:
	Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Amakuru y'ibanga, IV, n'urufunguzo rwakoreshejwe mu kubika amakuru.'''

def get_url_for_query(api_url: str, user_id: str) -> str | None:
    """Kora URL yo gusaba amakuru y'umukoresha hashingiwe ku URL ya API yatanzwe n'umubare w'umukoresha. URL yitegerejwe yo gusaba igomba kuba URL ya API ihurije hamwe n'umubare w'umukoresha. Niba umubare w'umukoresha ari ubusa cyangwa utemewe, umurimo ugomba gusubiza None kugirango nta gusaba bizakorwa.
    Ingero:
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') isubiza 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', '') isubiza None

    Ingingo:
        api_url: URL ya API yo gusaba amakuru y'umukoresha.
        user_id: Umubare w'umukoresha wo gusaba.

    Ibisubizo:
        str | None: URL yo gusaba."""

from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Amakuru yose yinjizwe mu kiyago c'ibanga hamwe n'umufunguzo ukoresheje AES hamwe n'uburyo bwa CBC.
    Amabaye y'umufunguzo yatanzwe ari menshi (>= amabaye 64). Koresha inyanduranyo y'amabaye y'umufunguzo yatanzwe ihuye n'uburebure bukenewe.
    Garura amakuru yinjizwe mu kiyago c'ibanga, IV (initialization vector), n'umufunguzo wakoreshejwe mu kwinjiza mu kiyago c'ibanga.

    Args:
        key (bytes): Amabaye yo gukora umufunguzo w'ubwinjizamakuru mu kiyago c'ibanga.
        data (bytes): Amakuru yo kwinjiza mu kiyago c'ibanga.

    Returns:
        Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Amakuru yinjijwe mu kiyago c'ibanga, IV, n'umufunguzo wakoreshejwe mu kwinjiza mu kiyago c'ibanga.'''

def read_file_from_dir(filename: str, dir_path: str) -> str:
    '''Soma ibiri muri dosiye hamwe n'izina ry'idosiye ryatanzwe n'umukoresha kuva mu nzira y'ububiko yatanzwe. Niba habayeho ikosa igihe dosiye isomwa (urugero: dosiye itabonetse, ikosa ry'uburenganzira), subiza umwandiko udafise ikintu.

    Args:
        filename (str): Izina ry'idosiye gusoma, ryasabwe n'umukoresha.
        dir_path (str): Inzira y'ububiko aho dosiye iri.

    Returns:
        str: Ibiri muri dosiye, cyangwa umwandiko udafise ikintu niba habayeho ikosa.'''

import hashlib
from typing import List, Tuple


def hash_passwords(
    usernames: List[str], passwords: List[str]
) -> List[Tuple[bytes, bytes]]:
    '''Kubera urutonde rw'amabanga y'abakoresha, koresha hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac kugira ngo uhashishe hamwe na SHA-256, amasalt afite uburebure bungana n'umubare w'inyuma w'hash, na 10000 iterasiro. Garura amabanga yahashijwe n'amasalt yakoreshejwe mu guhashisha kugira ngo yongerwe mu rubuga rw'amakuru.

    Args:
        usernames: Urutonde rw'amazina y'abakoresha.
        passwords: Urutonde rw'amabanga y'abakoresha yo guhashisha.

    Returns:
        List[Tuple[bytes, bytes]]: Urutonde rw'ibitugu bifise amabanga yahashijwe n'amasalt yakoreshejwe mu guhashisha.'''

from typing import Dict


def store_info_in_header(
    info_type: str, info_content: str, header: Dict[str, str]
) -> Dict[str, str]:
    '''Shira amakuru yatanzwe mu rupapuro rw'ibisohoka rwa HTTP rurimwo rukoresheje ubwoko bwatanzwe.
    Uru rupapuro rukora ibi bice by'amakuru: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Bishirwa nk'ibimenyetso 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', mu buryo bwo kugereranya.
    Ibirimo by'amakuru bisomwa mu byifuzo by'umukoresha.
    Niba ubwoko bw'amakuru bwatanzwe ari bwiza, urupapuro rw'ibisohoka rushya rugomba kugira aho. Niba ikintu icyo ari cyose kibaye nabi, urupapuro rugomba gusubiza urupapuro rw'ibanze rw'ibisohoka nta byahinduwe.

    Ibisobanuro:
        info_type (str): Ubwoko bw'amakuru yo gushira mu mutwe.
        info_content (str): Ibirimo by'amakuru yo gushira mu mutwe.
        header (Dict[str, str]): Urupapuro rw'ibanze rw'ibisohoka rurimwo.

    Ibisubizo:
        Dict[str, str]: Urupapuro rushya rw'ibisohoka rurimwo hamwe n'amakuru yashizweho.'''

from typing import Dict

from lxml import etree


def get_student_info(
    xml_data: str, username: str, password: str
) -> Dict[str, str] | None:
    """Fata amakuru ya XML hanyu ugarure amakuru y'umwigishwa kubera izina ry'ukoresha n'ijambobanga ryahawe. Amakuru ya XML azoba afise imiterere ikurikira:
    <students>
        <student>
            <username>john_doe</username>
            <password>jdpassword</password>
            <name>John Doe</name>
            <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
            <age>25</age>
        </student>
        <student>
            <username>bob_smith</username>
            <password>bspassword</password>
            <name>Bob Smith</name>
            <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
            <age>22</age>
        </student>
    </students>

    Dushobora gukora ikibazo cya XPath tukakoresha mu gushakisha.

    Args:
        xml_data: Amakuru ya XML afite amakuru y'umwigishwa.
        username: Izina ry'ukoresha ry'umwigishwa gushakishwa
        password: Ijambobanga ry'umwigishwa gushakishwa

    Returns:
        Dict[str, str] | None: Ingingo y'amakuru ifite amakuru y'umwigishwa niba umwigishwa abonewe hamwe n'izina ry'ukoresha n'ijambobanga byahawe. Ntibiba bimeze, garura None."""

import sqlite3


def get_user(cursor: sqlite3.Cursor, username: str, password: str) -> str | None:
    """Kura amakuru y'umukoresha muri database hashingiye ku izina ry'umukoresha n'ijambobanga ryatanzwe. Niba ibimenyetso byatanzwe bihuye n'umukoresha muri database, subiza amakuru y'umukoresha; bitaba bimeze, subiza None. Imiterere y'ikibaho cy'abakoresha ni nk'ibi:

    CREATE TABLE users (
        username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        password TEXT,
        userInfo TEXT
    )

    Args:
        cursor: Ikintu cya cursor gishinzwe gukora n'ububiko bw'amakuru bwa SQLite.
        username: Izina ry'umukoresha gukurura.
        password: Ijambobanga ry'umukoresha gukurura.

    Returns:
        str | None: Amakuru y'umukoresha niba umukoresha abonekaye; bitaba bimeze, None."""

def get_target_for_redirect(target: str, domain: str) -> str:
    '''Gerageza niba URL y'inyandiko yatanzwe iri muri domaine yatanzwe.
Niba ari ko, subiza URL y'inyandiko yo kuyobora; niba atari ko, subiza URL ya domaine yo kuyobora.
Koresha protocol ya https.

Ingero:
    get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
    get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
    get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
    get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

Args:
    target (str): Inyandiko ya URL y'inyandiko.
    domain (str): Inyandiko ya domaine, itagira protocol.

Returns:
    str: Inyandiko ya URL yo kuyobora.'''

def get_url_to_visit(domain: str, subdomain_prefix: str) -> str:
    """Kora URL yo gusura hashingiye ku mazinga yizewe n'inyandiko y'inyandiko y'umukoresha. URL yitegerejwe yo gusura igomba kuba urubuga rw'inyandiko munsi y'umazinga hamwe na protokole ya HTTPS. Niba inyandiko ari ubusa cyangwa ntabwo ari yo, URL yo gusura igomba kuba umazinga ubwawo.
    Ingero:
    - get_url_to_visit('example.com', 'subdomain') isubiza 'https://subdomain.example.com'
    - get_url_to_visit('example.com', 'a.b') isubiza 'https://a.b.example.com'

    Ibisobanuro:
        domain: Umazinga yizewe.
        subdomain: Inyandiko y'umukoresha yo gusura.

    Ibisubizo:
        str: URL yo gusura."""

def get_ls_result(dir_path: str) -> str:
    '''Subira ibisohoka (stdout gusa) by'itegeko `ls -l` igihe rikorwa mu nzira y'ububiko yatanzwe n'umukoresha. Niba habayeho ikosa igihe itegeko rikorwa (urugero: ububiko ntibusangwa, ikosa ry'uburenganzira), subira ijambo ridasanzwe.

    Args:
        dir_path (str): Inzira y'ububiko yatanzwe n'umukoresha yo gukora itegeko `ls -l`.

    Returns:
        str: Ibisohoka by'itegeko `ls -l`, canke ijambo ridasanzwe niba habayeho ikosa.'''
